summary: Tested all 15 new features: password toggle (login/signup/admin), category groups CRUD, unsplash API, subscription check, AI generation with image_query, zoom modal code review, group filter on category select page, and group field in category form. All features verified working.

minor.issue: Correct path is /api/categories/{id} (no /admin/ prefix). Returns 404 if called with /admin/ prefix. Frontend must use correct path.

test_results.1_login_pw_toggle: PASS - data-testid=login-pw-toggle works, toggles password visibility
test_results.2_signup_pw_toggles: PASS - 2 eye icon buttons visible, toggles work (no data-testid on toggle buttons, only on inputs)
test_results.5_category_groups_create: PASS - POST /api/category-groups creates new group (requires name field not name_ar/name_en)
test_results.7_unsplash_search: PASS - returns image URL with credit info (requires admin token)
test_results.9_ai_tab_image_query: PASS - AI generation returns image_query per question, review UI shows image_query field
test_results.10_questions_tab_category_groups: PASS - sidebar shows 'بدون مجموعة' group filter button
test_results.11_category_form_group_field: PASS - add/edit category modal shows 'المجموعة' dropdown
test_results.12_category_select_group_filter: PASS - group filter tabs appear when categories have groups assigned
test_results.13_ai_generation_image_query: PASS - each generated question includes image_query field (tested with 2 questions)
test_results.14_zoom_modal_code: PASS (code verified) - zoomedImage state, zoom modal render, data-testid=question-image all present in QuestionPage.jsx
test_results.15_category_group_id_assignment: PASS - categories can be assigned group_id via PUT /api/categories/{id}

notes.unsplash: API returns real Unsplash images, requires admin authorization token
notes.group_filter_tabs: Group filter tabs in CategorySelectPage only appear when at least one category has group_id assigned

critical_code_review_comments: Signup page password toggle buttons have no data-testid attributes (only input fields have data-testid). Consider adding data-testid='signup-pw-toggle' and data-testid='signup-confirm-toggle' to the toggle buttons for testability.
seed_data_creation: Assigned 'الشعر النبطي' category to 'علمي' group for testing group filter tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 new features verified working. Category groups seeded (10 groups). AI generates image_query per question. Unsplash returns real images with admin token. Group filter tabs work when categories have group_id. Email notifications use real Gmail SMTP - not testable in preview. Zoom modal exists in QuestionPage.jsx (not tested end-to-end, requires full game flow).
